57624.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
57624.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! IT'S WHAT IT SAYS ON THE TIN! You're welcome!

57625.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
57625.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

57626.title: Forever 80s
57626.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

57627.title: 40 No Solo: Only 80s Groups!
57627.description: We've gone through all of our favourite hits and have selected 40 of the best tracks from some of the biggest groups of the 80s! Enjoy!
